_description: DeFi Protocol Monitoring — Track major DeFi contracts for upgrades, balance shifts, and token movements
setup_commands: sentry.py add-contract --address 0x87870Bca3F3fD6335C3F4ce8392D69350B4fA4E2 --chain ethereum --label 'Aave V3 Pool' --watch upgrades,balance,tokens,events --events Transfer,Upgraded

repos.why: Track Uniswap v4 development — new hooks, security patches
Monitor Aave V3 for governance proposals, security fixes

contracts.label: Uniswap Universal Router
contracts.why: Detect proxy upgrades or implementation changes
